   "source": [
    "# Complete Floor Plan Generation Pipeline\n",
    "\n",
    "## Agentic AI for Customer-Centric Architectural Design Assistance\n",
    "\n",
    "This notebook provides an **end-to-end pipeline** for generating floor plans:\n",
    "\n",
    "1. **Phase 1**: AI Chatbot gathers requirements through natural conversation\n",
    "2. **Phase 2**: Requirements are converted to House-GAN++ graph format  \n",
    "3. **Phase 3**: House-GAN++ generates the floor plan layout\n",
    "4. **Phase 4**: Professional rendering with legend\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "### Prerequisites\n",
    "- Python 3.8+\n",
    "- Google Gemini API Key (free at https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey)\n",
    "- House-GAN++ pretrained model"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "47b95a49",

   "source": [

   "source": [
    "# Import core libraries\n",
    "import os\n",
    "import sys\n",
    "import json\n",
    "import re\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import torch\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from datetime import datetime\n",
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "from PIL import Image\n",
    "from typing import Dict, List, Optional\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add project root to path\n",
    "PROJECT_ROOT = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(os.getcwd(), '..'))\n",
    "if PROJECT_ROOT not in sys.path:\n",
    "    sys.path.insert(0, PROJECT_ROOT)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load .env file if exists\n",
    "env_path = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, '.env')\n",
    "if os.path.exists(env_path):\n",
    "    with open(env_path, 'r') as f:\n",
    "        for line in f:\n",
    "            if '=' in line and not line.startswith('#'):\n",
    "                key, value = line.strip().split('=', 1)\n",
    "                os.environ.setdefault(key, value)\n",
    "    print(f\"Loaded environment from: {env_path}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Project root: {PROJECT_ROOT}\")\n",
    "print(f\"PyTorch version: {torch.__version__}\")\n",
    "print(f\"CUDA available: {torch.cuda.is_available()}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",

   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Section 2: Load Chatbot Agent for Input Collection\n",
    "\n",
    "Initialize and configure the Gemini-based chatbot agent that collects user requirements through natural conversation."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "7b549180",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "API key configured!\n",
      "Key preview: AIzaSyBR...ICfk\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Configure Gemini API Key\n",
    "import os\n",
    "import getpass\n",
    "\n",
    "# Default API key (can be overridden by environment variable)\n",
    "DEFAULT_API_KEY = \"AIzaSyBRzjI1yGlMz0ou9tlD-MMuZKQzmVVICfk\"\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check for API key: environment variable takes priority, then default\n",
    "GEMINI_API_KEY = os.getenv('GEMINI_API_KEY', DEFAULT_API_KEY)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Validate\n",
    "if not GEMINI_API_KEY or len(GEMINI_API_KEY) < 20:\n",
    "    GEMINI_API_KEY = getpass.getpass(\"Enter your Gemini API Key: \")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"API key configured!\")\n",
    "print(f\"Key preview: {GEMINI_API_KEY[:8]}...{GEMINI_API_KEY[-4:]}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "aef25d61",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Floor Plan Design Agent initialized!\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Initialize Gemini and define the Floor Plan Design Agent\n",
    "import google.generativeai as genai\n",
    "\n",
    "genai.configure(api_key=GEMINI_API_KEY)\n",
    "\n",
    "class FloorPlanDesignAgent:\n",
    "    \"\"\"AI Agent for gathering floor plan requirements through conversation\"\"\"\n",
    "    \n",
    "    SUPPORTED_ROOMS = {\n",
    "        'living_room': 1, 'kitchen': 2, 'bedroom': 3, 'bathroom': 4,\n",
    "        'balcony': 5, 'entrance': 6, 'dining_room': 7, 'study': 8, 'storage': 10\n",
    "    }\n",
    "    \n",
    "    def __init__(self, api_key: str):\n",
    "        genai.configure(api_key=api_key)\n",
    "        self.model = genai.GenerativeModel('gemini-2.0-flash')\n",
    "        self.chat = None\n",
    "        self.conversation_history = []\n",
    "        self.extracted_requirements = {}\n",
    "        \n",
    "    def start_conversation(self) -> str:\n",
    "        \"\"\"Start a new conversation session\"\"\"\n",
    "        system_prompt = \"\"\"You are a professional architectural consultant helping design floor plans.\n",
    "Your goal is to extract requirements for House-GAN++ floor plan generation.\n",
    "\n",
    "SUPPORTED ROOM TYPES (only these can be generated):\n",
    "- Living Room (always included)\n",
    "- Kitchen (always included)  \n",
    "- Bedrooms (1-4)\n",
    "- Bathrooms (1-3)\n",
    "- Balcony (optional)\n",
    "- Entrance (always included)\n",
    "- Dining Room (optional, can be combined with living)\n",
    "- Study Room (optional)\n",
    "- Storage (optional)\n",
    "\n",
    "REQUIRED INFORMATION:\n",
    "1. Number of bedrooms (1-4)\n",
    "2. Number of bathrooms (1-3)\n",
    "3. Whether they want a balcony\n",
    "4. Living/dining combined or separate\n",
    "5. Additional rooms (study, storage)\n",
    "\n",
    "Keep conversation brief (5-7 exchanges). Start with a greeting and ask about bedrooms/bathrooms.\"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "        self.chat = self.model.start_chat(history=[])\n",
    "        response = self.chat.send_message(system_prompt)\n",
    "        self.conversation_history.append({\"role\": \"agent\", \"content\": response.text})\n",
    "        return response.text\n",
    "    \n",
    "    def send_message(self, user_input: str) -> str:\n",
    "        \"\"\"Send user message and get response\"\"\"\n",
    "        self.conversation_history.append({\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": user_input})\n",
    "        response = self.chat.send_message(user_input)\n",
    "        self.conversation_history.append({\"role\": \"agent\", \"content\": response.text})\n",
    "        return response.text\n",
    "    \n",
    "    def extract_requirements(self) -> Dict:\n",
    "        \"\"\"Extract structured requirements from conversation\"\"\"\n",
    "        conversation_text = \"\\n\".join([f\"{m['role']}: {m['content']}\" for m in self.conversation_history])\n",
    "        \n",
    "        extraction_prompt = f\"\"\"Extract floor plan requirements from this conversation:\n",
    "\n",
    "{conversation_text}\n",
    "\n",
    "Return ONLY this JSON (use defaults if info missing):\n",
    "{{\n",
    "    \"num_bedrooms\": <1-4, default 2>,\n",
    "    \"num_bathrooms\": <1-3, default 2>,\n",
    "    \"has_balcony\": <true/false, default true>,\n",
    "    \"has_study\": <true/false, default false>,\n",
    "    \"has_storage\": <true/false, default false>,\n",
    "    \"combined_living_dining\": <true/false, default false>,\n",
    "    \"notes\": \"<special preferences>\"\n",
    "}}\"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "        try:\n",
    "            response = self.model.generate_content(extraction_prompt)\n",
    "            json_text = re.sub(r'```json\\s*', '', response.text.strip())\n",
    "            json_text = re.sub(r'```\\s*$', '', json_text)\n",
    "            json_match = re.search(r'\\{.*\\}', json_text, re.DOTALL)\n",
    "            if json_match:\n",
    "                self.extracted_requirements = json.loads(json_match.group())\n",
    "                return self.extracted_requirements\n",
    "        except Exception as e:\n",
    "            print(f\"Extraction error: {e}\")\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Return defaults\n",
    "        self.extracted_requirements = {\n",
    "            \"num_bedrooms\": 2, \"num_bathrooms\": 2, \"has_balcony\": True,\n",
    "            \"has_study\": False, \"has_storage\": False, \"combined_living_dining\": False\n",
    "        }\n",
    "        return self.extracted_requirements\n",
    "    \n",
    "    def get_summary(self) -> str:\n",
    "        \"\"\"Generate human-readable summary\"\"\"\n",
    "        req = self.extracted_requirements\n",
    "        return f\"\"\"\n",
    "{'='*50}\n",
    "FLOOR PLAN REQUIREMENTS\n",
    "{'='*50}\n",
    "Bedrooms: {req.get('num_bedrooms', 2)}\n",
    "Bathrooms: {req.get('num_bathrooms', 2)}\n",
    "Living Room: Yes (always included)\n",
    "Kitchen: Yes (always included)\n",
    "Entrance: Yes (always included)\n",
    "Dining Room: {'Combined with Living' if req.get('combined_living_dining') else 'Separate'}\n",
    "Balcony: {'Yes' if req.get('has_balcony') else 'No'}\n",
    "Study: {'Yes' if req.get('has_study') else 'No'}\n",
    "Storage: {'Yes' if req.get('has_storage') else 'No'}\n",
    "{'='*50}\n",
    "\"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "# Initialize agent\n",
    "agent = FloorPlanDesignAgent(GEMINI_API_KEY)\n",
    "print(\"Floor Plan Design Agent initialized!\")"
   ]
  },
  {

   "source": [
    "## Section 3: Interactive Chat to Gather Requirements\n",
    "\n",
    "Run this cell to start the conversation. Answer the agent's questions or type 'skip' to use defaults."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",

   "outputs": [

      "FLOOR PLAN DESIGN ASSISTANT\n",

      "Hello! I'm assisting with the floor plan generation. To start, how many bedrooms and bathrooms are you looking for?\n",

     ]

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Interactive conversation with the agent\n",
    "print(\"FLOOR PLAN DESIGN ASSISTANT\")\n",
    "print(\"=\" * 50)\n",
    "print(\"Type 'done' when finished, 'skip' to use defaults\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    response = agent.start_conversation()\n",
    "    print(f\"Agent:\\n{response}\\n\")\n",
    "    print(\"-\" * 50)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    while True:\n",
    "        user_input = input(\"\\nYou: \").strip()\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if not user_input:\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "        \n",
    "        if user_input.lower() == 'skip':\n",
    "            print(\"\\nUsing default configuration...\")\n",
    "            agent.extracted_requirements = {\n",
    "                \"num_bedrooms\": 2, \"num_bathrooms\": 2, \"has_balcony\": True,\n",
    "                \"has_study\": False, \"has_storage\": False, \"combined_living_dining\": False\n",
    "            }\n",
    "            break\n",
    "            \n",
    "        if user_input.lower() in ['done', 'finish', 'exit']:\n",
    "            print(\"\\nConversation complete!\")\n",
    "            break\n",
    "        \n",
    "        response = agent.send_message(user_input)\n",
    "        print(f\"\\nAgent:\\n{response}\")\n",
    "        print(\"-\" * 50)\n",
    "        \n",
    "except KeyboardInterrupt:\n",
    "    print(\"\\n\\nConversation interrupted.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nRun the next cell to extract requirements.\")"
   ]
  },

    "Extract the structured requirements in House-GAN++ compatible format."

   "source": [
    "# Extract requirements from conversation\n",
    "print(\"Extracting requirements...\\n\")\n",

    "if not agent.extracted_requirements:\n",

    "else:\n",

    "# Display summary\n",
    "print(agent.get_summary())\n",
    "\n",
    "# Show JSON format\n",
    "print(\"\\nJSON Format:\")\n",

    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nRequirements ready for House-GAN++!\")"
   ]

    "\n",
    "## Section 5: Load House-GAN++ Model\n",

    "Load the pretrained House-GAN++ generator model."
   ]

    "# Setup House-GAN++ model path\n",
    "CHECKPOINT_PATH = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'houseganpp', 'checkpoints', 'pretrained.pth')\n",

    "    raise FileNotFoundError(\"Please ensure House-GAN++ pretrained model is available\")"

   "source": [
    "# Load House-GAN++ inference engine (V2 - proper implementation)\n",
    "print(\"Loading House-GAN++ model (V2 - matches original paper)...\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Force reload modules to pick up changes\n",
    "import importlib\n",
    "import houseganpp_integration.inference_v2\n",
    "importlib.reload(houseganpp_integration.inference_v2)\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    # Use V2 inference that properly matches the original House-GAN++ paper\n",
    "    from houseganpp_integration.inference_v2 import HouseGANPPInferenceV2\n",
    "    from houseganpp_integration.requirements_converter import RequirementsConverter\n",
    "    print(\"Γ£ô House-GAN++ V2 integration module loaded\")\n",
    "except ImportError as e:\n",
    "    print(f\"Import error: {e}\")\n",
    "    sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'houseganpp_integration'))\n",
    "    from inference_v2 import HouseGANPPInferenceV2\n",
    "    from requirements_converter import RequirementsConverter\n",
    "\n",
    "# Initialize V2 inference engine (properly follows original paper)\n",
    "inference_engine = HouseGANPPInferenceV2(checkpoint_path=CHECKPOINT_PATH)\n",
    "print(f\"Γ£ô Model loaded! Device: {inference_engine.device}\")\n",
    "print(\"\\nV2 improvements:\")\n",
    "print(\"  - Exact one-hot encoding as original paper\")\n",

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5f16744e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Section 6: Convert Requirements to Graph Representation\n",
    "\n",
    "Convert the chatbot-collected requirements into a graph with room nodes and adjacency edges."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "66266980",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Converting requirements to graph format...\n",
      "\n",
      "Room Configuration:\n",
      "------------------------------\n",
      "  Living Room: 1\n",
      "  Entrance: 1\n",
      "  Kitchen: 1\n",
      "  Bedroom: 2\n",
      "  Bathroom: 2\n",
      "  Balcony: 1\n",
      "\n",
      "Total rooms: 8\n",
      "Total graph nodes: 13\n",
      "Total edges: 78\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Convert requirements to House-GAN++ format\n",
    "print(\"Converting requirements to graph format...\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "converter = RequirementsConverter()\n",
    "nodes, edges, room_names = converter.convert(FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Room type names\n",
    "ROOM_TYPE_NAMES = {\n",
    "    1: 'Living Room', 2: 'Kitchen', 3: 'Bedroom', 4: 'Bathroom',\n",
    "    5: 'Balcony', 6: 'Entrance', 7: 'Dining Room', 8: 'Study',\n",
    "    10: 'Storage', 15: 'Front Door', 17: 'Interior Door'\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "# Count rooms (excluding doors)\n",
    "room_counts = {}\n",
    "for node_type, name in zip(nodes, room_names):\n",
    "    if node_type not in [15, 17]:\n",
    "        room_type = ROOM_TYPE_NAMES.get(node_type, 'Unknown')\n",
    "        room_counts[room_type] = room_counts.get(room_type, 0) + 1\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Room Configuration:\")\n",
    "print(\"-\" * 30)\n",
    "for room_type, count in room_counts.items():\n",
    "    print(f\"  {room_type}: {count}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\\nTotal rooms: {sum(room_counts.values())}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Total graph nodes: {len(nodes)}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Total edges: {len(edges)}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c71dd66d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Phase 3: Agentic Floor Plan Generation\n",
    "\n",
    "The AI agent now:\n",
    "1. **Visualizes** the room adjacency graph extracted from your requirements\n",
    "2. **Generates** floor plans using House-GAN++ with template matching\n",
    "3. **Creates** multiple variations automatically\n",
    "4. **Selects** the best layout based on room balance\n",
    "5. **Exports** all results with full session metadata"
   ]
  },

     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\n",
      "Γ£ô Graph has 8 rooms with 11 adjacency connections\n",
      "\n",
      "≡ƒÅá STEP 2: House-GAN++ Generation\n",
      "----------------------------------------\n",
      "Using iterative refinement (as in original paper)...\n",
      "Random seed: 3972\n",
      "Using template: 18477.json (2BR/1BA)\n",
      "\n",
      "Γ£ô Floor plan generated!\n",
      "  Output image size: (712, 512)\n",
      "  Rooms in output: 6\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Generate floor plan using V2 inference with template matching\n",
    "print(\"=\"*60)\n",
    "print(\"PHASE 3: FLOOR PLAN GENERATION\")\n",
    "print(\"=\"*60)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Step 1: Display the input graph structure\n",
    "print(\"\\n≡ƒôè STEP 1: Input Graph Visualization\")\n",
    "print(\"-\"*40)\n",
    "\n",
    "import networkx as nx\n",
    "\n",
    "# Room type colors for visualization\n",
    "ROOM_COLORS = {\n",
    "    1: '#EE4D4D',  # Living room - red (matches House-GAN++)\n",
    "    2: '#C67C7B',  # Kitchen - salmon\n",
    "    3: '#FFD274',  # Bedroom - yellow\n",
    "    4: '#BEBEBE',  # Bathroom - gray\n",
    "    5: '#BFE3E8',  # Balcony - light blue\n",
    "    6: '#7BA779',  # Entrance - green\n",
    "    7: '#E87A90',  # Dining - pink\n",
    "    8: '#FF8C69',  # Study - orange\n",
    "    10: '#1F849B', # Storage - teal\n",
    "    15: '#727171', # Front door - dark gray\n",
    "    17: '#D3A2C7', # Interior door - purple\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create NetworkX graph from requirements\n",
    "G = nx.Graph()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add nodes (only main rooms, not doors)\n",
    "for i, (node_type, name) in enumerate(zip(nodes, room_names)):\n",
    "    if node_type not in [15, 17]:\n",
    "        color = ROOM_COLORS.get(node_type, '#FFFFFF')\n",
    "        G.add_node(i, label=name, color=color, room_type=node_type)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add edges (adjacency relationships)\n",
    "for edge in edges:\n",
    "    src, relation, dst = int(edge[0]), int(edge[1]), int(edge[2])\n",
    "    if relation == 1:  # Only positive (adjacent) edges\n",
    "        if nodes[src] not in [15, 17] and nodes[dst] not in [15, 17]:\n",
    "            G.add_edge(src, dst)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Visualize the graph\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 6))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Left: Room adjacency graph\n",
    "node_colors = [G.nodes[n]['color'] for n in G.nodes()]\n",
    "labels = {n: G.nodes[n]['label'] for n in G.nodes()}\n",
    "pos = nx.spring_layout(G, k=2, iterations=50, seed=42)\n",
    "\n",
    "nx.draw_networkx_edges(G, pos, ax=axes[0], edge_color='gray', width=2, alpha=0.6)\n",
    "nx.draw_networkx_nodes(G, pos, ax=axes[0], node_color=node_colors, \n",
    "                       node_size=2000, edgecolors='black', linewidths=2)\n",
    "nx.draw_networkx_labels(G, pos, labels, ax=axes[0], font_size=8, font_weight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[0].set_title('Input: Room Adjacency Graph\\n(Connections define spatial relationships)', \n",
    "                  fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Right: Room configuration summary\n",
    "axes[1].axis('off')\n",
    "axes[1].set_xlim(0, 1)\n",
    "axes[1].set_ylim(0, 1)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display requirements summary\n",
    "summary_text = f\"\"\"\n",
    "EXTRACTED REQUIREMENTS\n",
    "{'='*30}\n",
    "\n",
    "From Chatbot Conversation:\n",
    "ΓÇó Bedrooms: {FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('num_bedrooms', 2)}\n",
    "ΓÇó Bathrooms: {FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('num_bathrooms', 1)}\n",
    "ΓÇó Balcony: {'Yes' if FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('has_balcony') else 'No'}\n",
    "ΓÇó Study: {'Yes' if FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('has_study') else 'No'}\n",
    "ΓÇó Combined Living/Dining: {'Yes' if FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('combined_living_dining') else 'No'}\n",
    "\n",
    "Graph Statistics:\n",
    "ΓÇó Total room nodes: {G.number_of_nodes()}\n",
    "ΓÇó Total connections: {G.number_of_edges()}\n",
    "ΓÇó Room types: {len(set(nodes[nodes < 15]))}\n",
    "\"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[1].text(0.1, 0.9, summary_text, transform=axes[1].transAxes, \n",
    "             fontsize=11, verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',\n",
    "             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightgray', alpha=0.8))\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[1].set_title('Configuration Summary', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\\nΓ£ô Graph has {G.number_of_nodes()} rooms with {G.number_of_edges()} adjacency connections\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Step 2: Generate floor plan\n",
    "print(\"\\n≡ƒÅá STEP 2: House-GAN++ Generation\")\n",
    "print(\"-\"*40)\n",
    "print(\"Using iterative refinement (as in original paper)...\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Use random seed for variety (can be changed for different layouts)\n",
    "import random\n",
    "SEED = random.randint(1, 10000)\n",
    "print(f\"Random seed: {SEED}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "result = inference_engine.generate_from_requirements(\n",
    "    FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS,\n",
    "    num_iterations=5,\n",
    "    seed=SEED,\n",
    "    use_template=True\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nΓ£ô Floor plan generated!\")\n",
    "print(f\"  Output image size: {result['image'].size}\")\n",
    "print(f\"  Rooms in output: {len([n for n in result['nodes'] if n not in [15, 17]])}\")"
   ]
  },

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Display the generated floor plan\n",
    "print(\"\\n≡ƒÄ¿ STEP 3: Floor Plan Visualization\")\n",
    "print(\"-\"*40)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. Main floor plan with legend\n",
    "axes[0].imshow(result['image'])\n",
    "axes[0].set_title(f'Generated Floor Plan\\n(Seed: {SEED})', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "axes[0].axis('off')\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Room analysis\n",
    "masks = result['masks']\n",
    "room_info = []\n",
    "\n",
    "for i, (m, nd, name) in enumerate(zip(masks, result['nodes'], result['room_names'])):\n",
    "    if nd in [15, 17]:  # Skip doors\n",
    "        continue\n",
    "    area = np.sum(m > 0)\n",
    "    pct = area / (m.shape[0] * m.shape[1]) * 100\n",
    "    room_info.append((name, nd, area, pct))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create bar chart of room sizes\n",
    "room_names_plot = [r[0] for r in room_info]\n",
    "room_areas = [r[2] for r in room_info]\n",
    "room_colors_plot = [ROOM_COLORS.get(r[1], '#808080') for r in room_info]\n",
    "\n",
    "bars = axes[1].barh(room_names_plot, room_areas, color=room_colors_plot, edgecolor='black')\n",
    "axes[1].set_xlabel('Mask Area (pixels)', fontsize=10)\n",
    "axes[1].set_title('Room Size Distribution', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "axes[1].invert_yaxis()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add value labels\n",
    "for bar, area in zip(bars, room_areas):\n",
    "    axes[1].text(bar.get_width() + 5, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, \n",
    "                f'{area}px', va='center', fontsize=9)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Print summary\n",
    "print(f\"\\nΓ£ô Floor plan rendered with {len(room_info)} rooms\")\n",
    "print(f\"  Largest room: {max(room_info, key=lambda x: x[2])[0]}\")\n",
    "print(f\"  Smallest room: {min(room_info, key=lambda x: x[2])[0]}\")"
   ]
  },

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Generate multiple variations automatically\n",
    "print(\"\\n≡ƒöä STEP 4: Generating Layout Variations\")\n",
    "print(\"-\"*40)\n",
    "print(\"Creating multiple layout options from the same requirements...\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Generate random seeds for variations\n",
    "NUM_VARIATIONS = 6\n",
    "variation_seeds = [random.randint(1, 10000) for _ in range(NUM_VARIATIONS)]\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(18, 12))\n",
    "axes = axes.flatten()\n",
    "\n",
    "variations = []\n",
    "\n",
    "for idx, var_seed in enumerate(variation_seeds):\n",
    "    # Generate with this seed\n",
    "    variation = inference_engine.generate_from_requirements(\n",
    "        FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS,\n",
    "        num_iterations=5,\n",
    "        seed=var_seed,\n",
    "        use_template=True\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    variations.append({'seed': var_seed, 'result': variation})\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Display\n",
    "    axes[idx].imshow(variation['image'])\n",
    "    axes[idx].set_title(f'Variation {idx+1} (Seed: {var_seed})', fontsize=11)\n",
    "    axes[idx].axis('off')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.suptitle(f'Floor Plan Variations\\n{FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get(\"num_bedrooms\", 2)} Bedrooms, '\n",
    "             f'{FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get(\"num_bathrooms\", 1)} Bathrooms'\n",
    "             f'{\", Balcony\" if FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get(\"has_balcony\") else \"\"}', \n",
    "             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\\nΓ£ô Generated {NUM_VARIATIONS} unique layout variations!\")\n",
    "print(\"  Each variation shows a different spatial arrangement.\")\n",
    "print(\"\\n  Seeds used:\", variation_seeds)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 28,
   "id": "2dbb7107",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\n",
      "≡ƒÆ╛ STEP 5: Auto-Select & Save Best Layout\n",
      "----------------------------------------\n",
      "Auto-selected: Variation with seed 5720 (best room balance)\n",
      "\n",
      "Γ£ô Floor plan saved successfully!\n",
      "\n",
      "Files saved:\n",
      "  image: floorplan_2BR_2BA_20251203_142520.png\n",
      "  masks: floorplan_2BR_2BA_20251203_142520_masks.npy\n",
      "  metadata: floorplan_2BR_2BA_20251203_142520_meta.json\n",
      "  session: floorplan_2BR_2BA_20251203_142520_session.json\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x800 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Automatically select and save the best variation\n",
    "print(\"\\n≡ƒÆ╛ STEP 5: Auto-Select & Save Best Layout\")\n",
    "print(\"-\"*40)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Auto-select: Choose variation with best room coverage (most balanced)\n",
    "def score_variation(var):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Score a variation based on room coverage balance\"\"\"\n",
    "    masks = var['result']['masks']\n",
    "    nodes = var['result']['nodes']\n",
    "    areas = []\n",
    "    for m, nd in zip(masks, nodes):\n",
    "        if nd not in [15, 17]:\n",
    "            areas.append(np.sum(m > 0))\n",
    "    if not areas:\n",
    "        return 0\n",
    "    # Score: total coverage + bonus for balance (low std dev)\n",
    "    total_coverage = sum(areas)\n",
    "    balance_score = 1000 / (1 + np.std(areas))  # Lower std = more balanced\n",
    "    return total_coverage + balance_score\n",
    "\n",
    "# Find best variation\n",
    "best_variation = max(variations, key=score_variation)\n",
    "best_seed = best_variation['seed']\n",
    "best_result = best_variation['result']\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Auto-selected: Variation with seed {best_seed} (best room balance)\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create output directory\n",
    "output_dir = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'notebooks', 'generated_floorplans')\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Generate filename with timestamp and requirements info\n",
    "timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')\n",
    "req_summary = f\"{FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('num_bedrooms', 2)}BR_{FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('num_bathrooms', 1)}BA\"\n",
    "filename = f'floorplan_{req_summary}_{timestamp}'\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save files\n",
    "paths = inference_engine.save_result(best_result, output_dir, filename)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Also save all variations metadata\n",
    "variations_meta = {\n",
    "    'requirements': FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS,\n",
    "    'selected_seed': best_seed,\n",
    "    'all_seeds': variation_seeds,\n",
    "    'timestamp': timestamp,\n",
    "    'generation_method': 'House-GAN++ V2 with template matching'\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "meta_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f'{filename}_session.json')\n",
    "with open(meta_path, 'w') as f:\n",
    "    json.dump(variations_meta, f, indent=2)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\\nΓ£ô Floor plan saved successfully!\")\n",
    "print(f\"\\nFiles saved:\")\n",
    "for key, path in paths.items():\n",
    "    print(f\"  {key}: {os.path.basename(path)}\")\n",
    "print(f\"  session: {os.path.basename(meta_path)}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display final result\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\n",
    "ax.imshow(best_result['image'])\n",
    "ax.set_title(f'Selected Floor Plan\\n{req_summary} | Seed: {best_seed}', \n",
    "             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "ax.axis('off')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },

    "# Export all generated variations\n",
    "print(\"\\n≡ƒôü Exporting All Variations\")\n",
    "print(\"-\"*40)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save all variation images\n",
    "for i, var in enumerate(variations):\n",
    "    var_filename = f'{filename}_var{i+1}_seed{var[\"seed\"]}'\n",
    "    var_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f'{var_filename}.png')\n",
    "    var['result']['image'].save(var_path)\n",
    "    print(f\"  Saved: {os.path.basename(var_path)}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Save complete requirements from chatbot\n",
    "full_requirements = {\n",
    "    'extracted_requirements': FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS,\n",
    "    'conversation_history': agent.conversation_history,\n",
    "    'graph_info': {\n",
    "        'num_nodes': len(nodes),\n",
    "        'num_edges': len(edges),\n",
    "        'room_types': [int(n) for n in nodes if n not in [15, 17]],\n",
    "        'room_names': [name for name, nt in zip(room_names, nodes) if nt not in [15, 17]]\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'generation_info': {\n",
    "        'model': 'House-GAN++ V2',\n",
    "        'selected_seed': best_seed,\n",
    "        'all_variation_seeds': variation_seeds,\n",
    "        'timestamp': timestamp\n",
    "    }\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "full_req_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f'{filename}_full_session.json')\n",
    "with open(full_req_path, 'w') as f:\n",
    "    json.dump(full_requirements, f, indent=2, default=str)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\\nΓ£ô All {len(variations)} variations exported!\")\n",
    "print(f\"Γ£ô Full session saved to: {os.path.basename(full_req_path)}\")\n",
    "print(f\"\\nOutput directory: {output_dir}\")"
   ]

    "# Final summary - fully automatic\n",
    "print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n",

    "print(f\"  ΓÇó Bathrooms: {FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('num_bathrooms', 1)}\")\n",
    "print(f\"  ΓÇó Balcony: {'Yes' if FLOOR_PLAN_REQUIREMENTS.get('has_balcony') else 'No'}\")\n",

    "\n",

    "print(f\"  Main floor plan: {filename}.png\")\n",
